pkgmetadata.longdescription: vLLM is a high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs. Features PagedAttention for efficient KV cache management, continuous batching, and an OpenAI-compatible API server. Supports 100+ model architectures including LLaMA, Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek, and more. Ideal for production LLM serving in container deployments.
